scripts.test: rm -rf ../../.tmp/ck-contracts-tests && esbuild src/security.test.ts src/overlay-identity.test.ts src/overlay-codebooks.test.ts src/translated-value-primitives.test.ts src/translation-product-state.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --out-extension:.js=.mjs --outdir=../../.tmp/ck-contracts-tests/src && node --test ../../.tmp/ck-contracts-tests/src/*.test.mjs
